summary: MIRA OS Bible Compliance Testing - Verified mira-demo page, understand-with-products API, Pet Vault, Soul Score, and pillar pages with MiraChatWidget. All 17 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend loads correctly with full Mira OS functionality.
context_for_next_testing_agent: MIRA OS Bible compliance verified. The understand-with-products API loads full pet soul data from database, enabling personalized responses. Mystique recognized as 'Drama Queen' with 87% soul score. All pillar pages have MiraChatWidget embedded via PillarPageLayout.

mira_demo_page.evidence: /mira-demo loads successfully for logged-in users. Shows personalized content for selected pet (Mystique with 87% soul score). Pet avatar, soul score, and chat interface all functional.

understand_with_products_api.evidence: POST /api/mira/os/understand-with-products returns pet-aware responses. API enriches pet context by loading full soul data from database (55+ soul questions, behavioral traits).

pillar_pages_mira_widget.evidence: /care pillar page shows MiraChatWidget ('Ask Mira' button) in bottom right. Subcategories (Grooming, Health, Supplements, Spa) visible. Same pattern applies to /celebrate and other pillars.

pet_vault_from_mira.evidence: Pet Vault endpoints accessible: /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/vaccines, /api/pet-vault/{pet_id}/summary - returns 200 OK with data.

pet_switching.evidence: User has 8 pets. Mira responds differently based on selected pet context. Pet selector visible in mira-demo interface.

soul_score_display.evidence: All 8 pets have soul scores displayed: Mystique (87%), Luna (88%), Mojo (78%), Meister (56%), Bruno (29%), Buddy (10%), Lola (9%), TestScoring (100%).

birthday_engine_hidden_feature.evidence: /api/celebrations/my-upcoming returns upcoming celebrations. Mira can query celebration data for personalized birthday recommendations.

api_endpoints_verified: GET /api/pets/my-pets - 200 OK (returns 8 pets with soul scores)

mira_bible_compliance.memory_first_principle: COMPLIANT - Mira loads full pet soul data from database before generating response (line 4508-4547 in mira_routes.py)
mira_bible_compliance.pet_context_loading: COMPLIANT - enriched_pet_context merges frontend data with database soul data
mira_bible_compliance.personalized_responses: COMPLIANT - API recognizes pet personality traits (Drama Queen for Mystique)
mira_bible_compliance.session_persistence: COMPLIANT - session_id enables conversation history persistence
mira_bible_compliance.conversation_intelligence: COMPLIANT - resolve_conversation_references handles 'that one', 'cheaper ones' references
